leadText: Cheek Pouch (Japanese: ほおぶくろ Cheek Pouch) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Cheek Pouch restores 33% of the Pokémon's maximum HP when it consumes a Berry , after the effect of the Berry is applied. Cheek Pouch activates even if the Pokémon eats another Pokémon's held Berry via Bug Bite , Pluck , or Fling , but only if the Berry is actually eaten for an effect (i.e. the Berry consumption animation plays). Consuming a Berry through other means (such as Natural Gift , using Fling , or its Trainer giving it a Berry from the Bag ) will not trigger Cheek Pouch. Cheek Pouch will not activate if the Pokémon is under the effect of Heal Block . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Cheek Pouch has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Cheek Pouch restores 33% of the Pokémon's maximum HP when it consumes a Berry , after the effect of the Berry is applied. Cheek Pouch activates even if the Pokémon eats another Pokémon's held Berry via Bug Bite , Pluck , or Fling , but only if the Berry is actually eaten for an effect (i.e. the Berry consumption animation plays). Consuming a Berry through other means (such as Natural Gift , using Fling , or its Trainer giving it a Berry from the Bag ) will not trigger Cheek Pouch. Cheek Pouch will not activate if the Pokémon is under the effect of Heal Block .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD When the Pokémon eats or drinks an item, some HP will be restored, too!
